allow: Bash(node -e "const a=require\('./apps/web-site-owner/package.json'\); const b=require\('./apps/web-admin/package.json'\); console.log\('web-site-owner next:', a.dependencies.next\); console.log\('web-admin next:', b.dependencies.next\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['public_url']\) for x in t.get\('tunnels',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('bundleUrl:', d.get\('bundleUrl',''\)\) print\('hostUri:', d.get\('hostUri',''\)\) print\('debuggerHost:', d.get\('debuggerHost',''\)\) except: print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:500]\) ")
